title: Telemetry
description: Bronze-layer event log. One row per sample per driver per lap. Sampled at ~10 Hz; ~2–5 million rows per race. Very wide partition   always filter by season and race_id.
x-notes: speed_kph, throttle_pct, brake_pct are float32 to save space. Sparse: many null samples for cars that DNF or have sensor dropouts.

speed_kph.description: Car speed in kilometres per hour. Sampled at ~10 Hz.

brake.description: True if brake pedal is applied.

brake_pct.description: Brake pressure, 0–100%. Null if not available from the car's ECU.

distance_m.description: Distance from lap start in metres. Resets to 0 on each new lap. May have small gaps during pit stops.

drs.description: DRS flap open. Null for cars without DRS (e.g., safety car).

driver_id.description: Three-letter driver code (HAM, VER, etc.). Links to laps.DriverNumber via stg_f1_laps.

season.description: Hive partition key. Always include in WHERE clause to avoid full scans.
